TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tjaranauma, title = Tjaranauma, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjaranauma} }

S.FORM: Tjaranauma i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjaranauma. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjaranauma sa, 125 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 543 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 538 ku tademaw, pakalatu 99%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5 ku tademaw, pakalatu 1%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 94%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: tjaranauma i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjaranauma. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjaranauma sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, amis *%, bunun *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Tjaranauma i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjaranauma. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjaranauma sa, 125 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 543 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 538 ku tademaw, pakalatu 99%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5 ku tademaw, pakalatu 1%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 94%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: tjaranauma i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjaranauma. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjaranauma sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, amis *%, bunun *%, zumazuma *%.
